text.en: Refer to PHC/CHC mental-health team for PHQ-9 confirmation and counselling.
Listen non-judgementally; reinforce that help is available; share Tele-MANAS 14416 hotline.
Ask explicitly about self-harm thoughts; if positive, escalate to HIGH and refer same day.

rules.rationale: PHQ-2 has high sensitivity for major depressive disorder; positive screen requires PHQ-9 confirmation and active suicide-risk assessment.

text.en: Stay with the person; remove access to pesticides, ropes, sharp items.
Call Tele-MANAS 14416 immediately for live counsellor support.
Refer to District Mental Health Programme today; involve family safely.

rules.rationale: Active suicidal ideation is a psychiatric emergency. WHO mhGAP and India's NMHP mandate same-day specialist contact and means restriction.
